title: stipa × pseudomacroglossa
intro: Stipa × pseudomacroglossa, also known as Japanese Big Bluestem, is a hybrid of the Stipa gigantea and Stipa pennata grass species. It is a perennial grass with medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and sore throat, while also promoting digestion and relieving menstrual cramps. Stipa × pseudomacroglossa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly consumed to harness its health benefits.
